name: homecraft
description: AI-powered furniture design platform — dialog and editor to production-ready BOM.

scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build --workspace @homecraft/client
scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace @homecraft/contracts && npm run build --workspace @homecraft/ai && npm run build --workspace @homecraft/catalog-schema
scripts.dev: npm run build:packages && concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace @homecraft/server" "npm run dev --workspace @homecraft/client"
scripts.dev:server: npm run build:packages && npm run dev --workspace @homecraft/server
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:packages && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test: npm run build:packages && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
scripts.catalog:index: npm run build:packages && npm run catalog:index --workspace @homecraft/server
